companies.name: Volval Devices
sampleHeadlines: Volval Devices recalls products in automated logistics line due to quality concerns

headlines.headline: Volval Devices recalls products in automated logistics line due to quality concerns

sentiment.reasoning: A product recall in an automated logistics line indicates immediate operational disruption and potential reputational damage that will likely persist as the company addresses quality control issues.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
